title: BEM-811 execute 810
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:40 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem810_route_after_bem809.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
responses=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
if rs=='next_filter_and_process_response':
    status='filter_response_required'; next_action='filter real Claude response from blocker files'
elif rs=='next_diagnose_claude_runtime_outcome':
    status='runtime_outcome_read'; next_action='patch Claude workflow/action based on outcome '+str(runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'))
elif rs=='next_verify_dispatch_target_run':
    status='dispatch_target_verify_required'; next_action='parse dispatch results or verify dispatcher workflow existence'
elif rs=='next_verify_pat_env':
    status='pat_env_verify_required'; next_action='parse token_missing result and patch GH_TOKEN secret name'
elif rs=='next_patch_dispatch_target':
    status='dispatch_target_patch_required'; next_action='patch target workflow id/ref/permissions'
else:
    status='infra_repair_required'; next_action=route.get('next_action','continue repair')
state={'bem':'BEM-811','status':status,'route_status':rs,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'dispatch_results':results[-10:],'responses':responses[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem811_execute_bem810_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem811_execute_bem810_route.md').write_text('# BEM-811 | Execute BEM-810 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem811_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-811'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem811_execute_bem810_route.json','governance/reports/bem811_execute_bem810_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem811_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-810 route by inspecting runtime/dispatch results/response files')
"""
